violations.text: The hand-washing sink was blocked by a strainer. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Inspector provided trips during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2025
Trash debris was present around the dumpster area. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2025
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the service area. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

The vents to the heating system have an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC sent photos of cleaned vents after inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
